condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.request_shape: POST /v1/messages with forced loose submit_action_object tool input; response object comes from tool_use.input.

open_items.description: Before the first live action cycle executes, verify that the pilot's scope boundaries (what the agent may and may not act on), success criteria, and rollback conditions are explicitly documented and agreed upon by all relevant stakeholders. This is a prerequisite for safe autonomous operation.
open_items.title: Confirm autonomy pilot scope boundaries and success criteria

input.response: Pilot wake seeded. One bounded follow-up item has been identified and preserved as an open item: confirming that the autonomy pilot's scope boundaries and success criteria are explicitly documented and agreed upon before the first live action cycle runs. A single follow-up wake has been scheduled to resolve this item, pulling the relevant recall record for context.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve open item oi-pilot-scope-confirmation-001: review and confirm autonomy pilot scope boundaries, success criteria, and rollback conditions before first live action cycle.
